languages.text: "Вот уж вы загнули. Искупление, оно для одного. Случись что с капитаном-интендантом и выживи я — лучше бы мне на свет и не рождаться".
"That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."
languages.original_text: "Вот уж вы загнули. Искупление, оно для одного. Случись что с капитаном-интендантом и выживи я — лучше бы мне на свет и не рождаться".

traits.locale_text: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."
"That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."
"Pretty words, very pretty. But... not a chance. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."
"That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."
"That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

languages.text: 「綺麗なお言葉、とても綺麗です。でも…無理です。船長・大工長が何かあったら、私が生き残ったとしても、生まれてこなかったと願うでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Pretty words, very pretty. But... not a chance. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

traits.locale_text: 「綺麗なお言葉、とても綺麗です。でも…無理です。船長・大工長が何かあったら、私が生き残ったとしても、生まれてこなかったと願うでしょう。」

languages.text: "Saçmalık. Kefaret, sona kalanın hakkıdır. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'ya bir şey olur ve ben hayatta kalırsam hiç doğmamış olmayı dilerim."
languages.original_text: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık. Kefaret, sona kalanın hakkıdır. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'ya bir şey olur ve ben hayatta kalırsam hiç doğmamış olmayı dilerim."

languages.text: «Qué tontería más bonita. Pero la expiación es solo para el último. Si le ocurre algo a la capitana intendente y yo sobrevivo, desearé no haber nacido».
languages.original_text: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

traits.locale_text: «Qué tontería más bonita. Pero la expiación es solo para el último. Si le ocurre algo a la capitana intendente y yo sobrevivo, desearé no haber nacido».

languages.text: “话说得漂亮，但毫无意义。唯有一人能得到救赎。要是军需官上尉出事，而我活了下来，那我会希望自己从来没出生过。”
languages.original_text: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

traits.locale_text: “话说得漂亮，但毫无意义。唯有一人能得到救赎。要是军需官上尉出事，而我活了下来，那我会希望自己从来没出生过。”

languages.text: « De bien belles paroles qui n'ont ni queue ni tête... L'expiation ne vaut que pour un seul, voyez-vous. S'il arrivait malheur à la capitaine-quartier-maître, je ne me le pardonnerais jamais. »
languages.original_text: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

traits.locale_text: « De bien belles paroles qui n'ont ni queue ni tête... L'expiation ne vaut que pour un seul, voyez-vous. S'il arrivait malheur à la capitaine-quartier-maître, je ne me le pardonnerais jamais. »

languages.text: "Das ist doch Unsinn. Buße ist nur etwas für den Einzelnen. Wenn der Captain-Quartiermeisterin etwas zustößt und ich überlebe, werde ich mir wünschen, ich wäre nie geboren worden."
languages.original_text: "That's just pretty nonsense. Atonement is only for the one, see. If something happens to the captain-quartermaster and I survive, I'll wish I'd never been born."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist doch Unsinn. Buße ist nur etwas für den Einzelnen. Wenn der Captain-Quartiermeisterin etwas zustößt und ich überlebe, werde ich mir wünschen, ich wäre nie geboren worden."
